levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: Same strike significant across ALL expiries. 0DTE: 12,516 OI (top PUT), WEEKLY: 6,505 OI, MONTHLY: 32,142 OI. 0DTE Max Pain aligns here. Structural dealer gamma support.
WEEKLY Max Pain at 0.003% from spot. Massive 586 CALL volume (40,788 VOL) confirms active pinning zone. Price magnet strongly active.
MONTHLY Max Pain with heavy dual interest: 30,889 PUT OI + 20,735 CALL OI. Options equilibrium zone. 0.86% above spot creates resistance.
Dominant 0DTE CALL OI (7,904) with strong WEEKLY presence (7,467). Bearish smirk skew (1.27-1.35) validates resistance. Key rejection level.
Massive MONTHLY PUT OI (40,311 - largest single strike). Appears across all expiries. Structural institutional support level.
Major MONTHLY resistance with 37,024 CALL OI + 38,747 PUT OI. Psychological level. Negative MONTHLY GEX amplifies moves here.

outlook.summary: Bearish bias confirmed by smirk skew across all expiries (ratio 1.32-1.38). Spot 6614 sits above 0DTE gamma flip but below weekly flip (6734). Extreme MONTHLY PCR (3.29) indicates heavy put positioning. Critical support confluence at 6400-6500 with multi-expiry resonance. Dealer short gamma in monthly amplifies downside tail risk.

levels.motivazione: Dominant PUT OI across ALL 3 expirations: 0DTE (3,943), WEEKLY (7,752), MONTHLY (23,612). Primary structural floor. Bearish skew (1.36) validates support strength.
Significant PUT OI in all expiries: 0DTE (3,619), WEEKLY (4,718), MONTHLY (20,668). Secondary support with high volume/OI ratio confirms activity.
0DTE Gamma Flip (6540.67) converges with Max Pain (6535). Dealer pinning zone. Positive GEX above creates stability. Strong magnetic attraction.
High mixed OI near spot: 0DTE (6,781 CALL + 2,512 PUT), MONTHLY (13,595 CALL + 23,085 PUT). Gamma neutral zone creates price magnet effect.
Highest 0DTE CALL OI (10,537) above spot with elevated VOL (14,857). Immediate resistance. Volume/OI ratio 1.41 indicates active positioning.
Weekly gamma flip. Dealers short gamma below this level, amplifying downside moves. Structural pivot with volatility trigger potential.
WEEKLY CALL WALL (5,048 OI) + significant MONTHLY CALL OI (4,214). Multi-expiry resistance ceiling with dealer hedging overhead.
Monthly CALL WALL (16,660 OI). Major structural ceiling. Negative monthly GEX (-12.47B) creates volatile reaction zone if tested.

Structural MONTHLY PUT WALL with 266 OI. Deep support 675 points below spot.
